name: Fennel, Mushroom and Parmesan Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the garlic and salt in a mortar until completely smooth.
2. Stir in the lemon juice, lemon peel, fennel seeds, and olive oil to make a tart, lemony vinaigrette.
3. Thinly slice the mushrooms and season them with plenty of freshly ground black pepper.
4. Lay a damp kitchen towel or plastic wrap over the mushrooms to keep them from browning; set aside for 1 hour to marinate.
5. Trim the fennel bulb and cut it into quarters. Remove most of the core, then slice lengthwise very thinly, leaving pieces joined together.
6. Dress the fennel with most of the remaining vinaigrette and half the herbs, and season with salt and pepper.
7. Add the rest of the herbs to the mushrooms.
8. Layer the marinated mushrooms, cheese, and fennel on plates; spoon the remaining vinaigrette over the top.
